subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Ancient Beauty! The days of 'Abdu'l-Bahá are beset by the onslaught of the faithless, the intensity of corruption, and the assaults of every [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال قدم ایام عبدالبهاء از کثرت هجوم اهل جفا و شدت فساد و تعرض هر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @exhortations and counsels, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
